commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional ContextEngineRuntimeSettings payload and threads it through context-engine lifecycle hooks, SDK exports, Codex app-server, CLI, compaction paths, docs, and tests.

PR surface: Source +389, Tests +514, Docs +20. Total +923 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: a before_model_resolve or before_agent_start hook can change modelId after requestedModelId is captured, making the new runtimeSettings payload report a false requested/resolved mismatch.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow code repair can correct the model-request semantics and add focused coverage without needing a product decision.

target.title: feat(context-engine): pass runtime settings into lifecycle
target.body:
## Summary

AI-assisted change: yes. Forge/Codex produced the implementation and PR shepherding with OpenAI `gpt-5.5`; ragesaq reviewed the direction and required production-grade proof before merge.

Pass a typed `ContextEngineRuntimeSettings` contract through the context-engine lifecycle for embedded, CLI, and Codex app-server runs. Context engines now receive a versioned snapshot of runtime mode, model/provider state, host capabilities, token limits, and diagnostics instead of only the assemble-time `model` string.

## Current Head

Current PR head: `39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5`.

Rebased over current `release/2026.5.31` base `a692516682b1ec343fd3e1216aa871b1532d404b`, after `v2026.5.31-beta.4` (`45edbcc71b5c0edc0187a48d30344810d7ac4baa`). GitHub reports the PR open, non-draft, mergeable, with 11 commits and 21 changed files.

Scope cleanup: the Copilot Gemini provider-metadata change was reverted out of this PR's effective diff. No `extensions/github-copilot` files remain in the changed-file list; that provider change should land separately if still needed.

## Changes

- Add `ContextEngineRuntimeSettings` and `ContextEngineRuntimeMode` in `src/context-engine/types.ts`.
- Add `buildContextEngineRuntimeSettings()` in `src/context-engine/runtime-settings.ts`.
- Thread `runtimeSettings` through bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, compact, and maintenance paths.
- Export the runtime-settings contract and errors through the public plugin SDK barrel.
- Preserve strict legacy context engines by retrying lifecycle calls without `runtimeSettings` when strict engines reject the new key.
- Document the public context-engine runtime-settings contract in `docs/concepts/context-engine.md` and `docs/plugins/sdk-overview.md`.
- Add configured-slot proof that a resolved context engine receives runtimeSettings across bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintenance, and compact.
- Preserve the same overflow compaction runtimeSettings into immediately-following post-compaction maintenance.
- Update the CLI context-engine lifecycle test to expect runtimeSettings on bootstrap instead of the old exact object shape.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed**: Context engines configured through `plugins.slots.contextEngine` receive the typed `runtimeSettings` payload after the fix across bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintenance, and compact lifecycle hooks.
- **Real environment tested**: Final-head OpenClaw checkout at `39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5`, run as a standalone Node process against OpenClaw runtime modules. This was not Vitest, CI, snapshots, or mocked test-runner output. The proof registered a real context-engine implementation, resolved it through the real context-engine registry using `plugins.slots.contextEngine`, then drove the real harness lifecycle functions.
- **Exact steps or command run after fix**: From the final-head checkout, run `node --import tsx --input-type=module` with a standalone proof script that registers a context engine, resolves it through `resolveContextEngine({ plugins: { slots: { contextEngine: engineId } } })`, and invokes `bootstrapHarnessContextEngine`, `assembleHarnessContextEngine`, `finalizeHarnessContextEngineTurn`, and `compactContextEngineWithSafetyTimeout`.
- **Evidence after fix**: Copied terminal output from the final-head standalone run, with session identifiers and message text redacted:

```json
{
  "proof": "real configured context-engine lifecycle runtimeSettings proof",
  "head": "39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5",
  "configuredEngineId": "real-runtime-settings-proof-1780308486419",
  "commandKind": "standalone node execution against OpenClaw runtime modules, not Vitest or CI",
  "hooksObserved": [
    "bootstrap",
    "maintain",
    "assemble",
    "afterTurn",
    "maintain",
    "compact"
  ],
  "missingHooks": [],
  "badEntries": [],
  "missingPromptBudgets": [],
  "runtimeSettingsByHook": [
    {
      "hook": "bootstrap",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": null
    },
    {
      "hook": "maintain",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": null
    },
    {
      "hook": "assemble",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": 2048
    },
    {
      "hook": "afterTurn",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": 2048
    },
    {
      "hook": "maintain",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": 2048
    },
    {
      "hook": "compact",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": 2048
    }
  ],
  "result": "PASS"
}
```

- **Observed result after fix**: The configured context engine was selected by the registry from `plugins.slots.contextEngine`. Every required lifecycle path produced `runtimeSettings.schemaVersion: 1`, fallback mode, requested/resolved model split, provider, `family: null`, `fallbackActive: true`, fallback reason, and embedded host identity. Prompt-budgeted hooks saw `tokenBudget: 2048`; bootstrap/startup maintenance correctly had no prompt budget yet.
- **What was not tested**: The standalone proof does not itself restart the production Gateway. Local install and runtime smoke validation are tracked separately from this PR-body proof.

## Feedback Addressed

- Codex P1 strict-schema legacy-engine feedback: fixed by including `runtimeSettings` in legacy lifecycle compatibility stripping for bootstrap, maintain, afterTurn, assemble, and compact.
- Codex CI failure feedback: fixed the stale CLI bootstrap test to assert the new runtimeSettings contract instead of the pre-contract exact object shape.
- Copilot fallback consistency feedback: fixed fallbackActive/fallbackReason consistency and covered it with runtime-settings tests.
- Copilot model-family feedback: fixed model.family to remain `null` unless a real family is supplied.
- Copilot Error subclass feedback: named the runtime-settings Error subclasses.
- Copilot degraded/capability branch feedback: covered degraded mode, invalid host capabilities, and fallback consistency test branches.
- Scope feedback: reverted the Copilot Gemini provider-metadata change from the effective diff so this PR stays focused on context-engine runtime settings.

## Validation

Current-head validation at `39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5`:

```text
node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/context-engine/runtime-settings.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/models.test.ts
PASS: 4 Vitest shards, 139 tests at previous beta.4 rebase head before provider-scope cleanup

node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.context-engine.test.ts
PASS: 1 Vitest shard, 12 tests

git diff --check origin/release/2026.5.31..HEAD
PASS

git diff --name-only origin/release/2026.5.31..HEAD | xargs pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1
PASS: all 20 matched files formatted

pnpm build
PASS: total 198.7s, check-plugin-sdk-exports OK

standalone runtimeSettings proof
PASS at 39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5
```

Full-repo `pnpm format:check` currently fails on pre-existing upstream files outside this PR surface, so changed-file formatting plus `git diff --check` are the relevant formatting gates for this branch.

## Compatibility and Risk

`runtimeSettings` remains optional on every lifecycle hook param. Engines that ignore it continue unchanged. Engines with strict unknown-field validation now get the same compatibility retry behavior OpenClaw already uses for legacy `sessionKey` and `prompt` additions.

Remaining review risk: maintainers may still prefer live-Gateway proof in addition to standalone current-head proof. This branch now has current-head source-level configured-engine proof, focused validation, type validation, and full local build validation.
target.author: ragesaq

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

- Copilot Error subclass feedback: named the runtime-settings Error subclasses.
- Copilot degraded/capability branch feedback: covered degraded mode, invalid host capabilities, and fallback consistency test branches.
- Scope feedback: reverted the Copilot Gemini provider-metadata change from the effective diff so this PR stays focused on context-engine runtime settings.

## Validation

Current-head validation at `39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5`:

```text
node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/context-engine/runtime-settings.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/models.test.ts
PASS: 4 Vitest shards, 139 tests at previous beta.4 rebase head before provider-scope cleanup

node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.context-engine.test.ts
PASS: 1 Vitest shard, 12 tests

git diff --check origin/release/2026.5.31..HEAD
PASS

git diff --name-only origin/release/2026.5.31..HEAD | xargs pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1
PASS: all 20 matched files formatted

pnpm build
PASS: total 198.7s, check-plugin-sdk-exports OK

standalone runtimeSettings proof
PASS at 39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5
```

Full-repo `pnpm format:check` currently fails on pre-existing upstream files outside this PR surface, so changed-file formatting plus `git diff --check` are the relevant formatting gates for this branch.

## Compatibility and Risk

`runtimeSettings` remains optional on every lifecycle hook param. Engines that ignore it continue unchanged. Engines with strict unknown-field validation now get the same compatibility retry behavior OpenClaw already uses for legacy `sessionKey` and `prompt` additions.

Remaining review risk: maintainers may still prefer live-Gateway proof in addition to standalone current-head proof. This branch now has current-head source-level configured-engine proof, focused validation, type validation, and full local build validation.

target.title: feat(context-engine): pass runtime settings into lifecycle
target.body:
## Summary

AI-assisted change: yes. Forge/Codex produced the implementation and PR shepherding with OpenAI `gpt-5.5`; ragesaq reviewed the direction and required production-grade proof before merge.

Pass a typed `ContextEngineRuntimeSettings` contract through the context-engine lifecycle for embedded, CLI, and Codex app-server runs. Context engines now receive a versioned snapshot of runtime mode, model/provider state, host capabilities, token limits, and diagnostics instead of only the assemble-time `model` string.

## Current Head

Current PR head: `39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5`.

Rebased over current `release/2026.5.31` base `a692516682b1ec343fd3e1216aa871b1532d404b`, after `v2026.5.31-beta.4` (`45edbcc71b5c0edc0187a48d30344810d7ac4baa`). GitHub reports the PR open, non-draft, mergeable, with 11 commits and 21 changed files.

Scope cleanup: the Copilot Gemini provider-metadata change was reverted out of this PR's effective diff. No `extensions/github-copilot` files remain in the changed-file list; that provider change should land separately if still needed.

## Changes

- Add `ContextEngineRuntimeSettings` and `ContextEngineRuntimeMode` in `src/context-engine/types.ts`.
- Add `buildContextEngineRuntimeSettings()` in `src/context-engine/runtime-settings.ts`.
- Thread `runtimeSettings` through bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, compact, and maintenance paths.
- Export the runtime-settings contract and errors through the public plugin SDK barrel.
- Preserve strict legacy context engines by retrying lifecycle calls without `runtimeSettings` when strict engines reject the new key.
- Document the public context-engine runtime-settings contract in `docs/concepts/context-engine.md` and `docs/plugins/sdk-overview.md`.
- Add configured-slot proof that a resolved context engine receives runtimeSettings across bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintenance, and compact.
- Preserve the same overflow compaction runtimeSettings into immediately-following post-compaction maintenance.
- Update the CLI context-engine lifecycle test to expect runtimeSettings on bootstrap instead of the old exact object shape.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed**: Context engines configured through `plugins.slots.contextEngine` receive the typed `runtimeSettings` payload after the fix across bootstrap, assemble, afterTurn, maintenance, and compact lifecycle hooks.
- **Real environment tested**: Final-head OpenClaw checkout at `39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5`, run as a standalone Node process against OpenClaw runtime modules. This was not Vitest, CI, snapshots, or mocked test-runner output. The proof registered a real context-engine implementation, resolved it through the real context-engine registry using `plugins.slots.contextEngine`, then drove the real harness lifecycle functions.
- **Exact steps or command run after fix**: From the final-head checkout, run `node --import tsx --input-type=module` with a standalone proof script that registers a context engine, resolves it through `resolveContextEngine({ plugins: { slots: { contextEngine: engineId } } })`, and invokes `bootstrapHarnessContextEngine`, `assembleHarnessContextEngine`, `finalizeHarnessContextEngineTurn`, and `compactContextEngineWithSafetyTimeout`.
- **Evidence after fix**: Copied terminal output from the final-head standalone run, with session identifiers and message text redacted:

```json
{
  "proof": "real configured context-engine lifecycle runtimeSettings proof",
  "head": "39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5",
  "configuredEngineId": "real-runtime-settings-proof-1780308486419",
  "commandKind": "standalone node execution against OpenClaw runtime modules, not Vitest or CI",
  "hooksObserved": [
    "bootstrap",
    "maintain",
    "assemble",
    "afterTurn",
    "maintain",
    "compact"
  ],
  "missingHooks": [],
  "badEntries": [],
  "missingPromptBudgets": [],
  "runtimeSettingsByHook": [
    {
      "hook": "bootstrap",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": null
    },
    {
      "hook": "maintain",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": null
    },
    {
      "hook": "assemble",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": 2048
    },
    {
      "hook": "afterTurn",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": 2048
    },
    {
      "hook": "maintain",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": 2048
    },
    {
      "hook": "compact",
      "schemaVersion": 1,
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": 2048
    }
  ],
  "result": "PASS"
}
```

- **Observed result after fix**: The configured context engine was selected by the registry from `plugins.slots.contextEngine`. Every required lifecycle path produced `runtimeSettings.schemaVersion: 1`, fallback mode, requested/resolved model split, provider, `family: null`, `fallbackActive: true`, fallback reason, and embedded host identity. Prompt-budgeted hooks saw `tokenBudget: 2048`; bootstrap/startup maintenance correctly had no prompt budget yet.
- **What was not tested**: The standalone proof does not itself restart the production Gateway. Local install and runtime smoke validation are tracked separately from this PR-body proof.

## Feedback Addressed

- Codex P1 strict-schema legacy-engine feedback: fixed by including `runtimeSettings` in legacy lifecycle compatibility stripping for bootstrap, maintain, afterTurn, assemble, and compact.
- Codex CI failure feedback: fixed the stale CLI bootstrap test to assert the new runtimeSettings contract instead of the pre-contract exact object shape.
- Copilot fallback consistency feedback: fixed fallbackActive/fallbackReason consistency and covered it with runtime-settings tests.
- Copilot model-family feedback: fixed model.family to remain `null` unless a real family is supplied.
- Copilot Error subclass feedback: named the runtime-settings Error subclasses.
- Copilot degraded/capability branch feedback: covered degraded mode, invalid host capabilities, and fallback consistency test branches.
- Scope feedback: reverted the Copilot Gemini provider-metadata change from the effective diff so this PR stays focused on context-engine runtime settings.

## Validation

Current-head validation at `39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5`:

```text
node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/context-engine/runtime-settings.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/models.test.ts
PASS: 4 Vitest shards, 139 tests at previous beta.4 rebase head before provider-scope cleanup

node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.context-engine.test.ts
PASS: 1 Vitest shard, 12 tests

git diff --check origin/release/2026.5.31..HEAD
PASS

git diff --name-only origin/release/2026.5.31..HEAD | xargs pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1
PASS: all 20 matched files formatted

pnpm build
PASS: total 198.7s, check-plugin-sdk-exports OK

standalone runtimeSettings proof
PASS at 39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5
```

Full-repo `pnpm format:check` currently fails on pre-existing upstream files outside this PR surface, so changed-file formatting plus `git diff --check` are the relevant formatting gates for this branch.

## Compatibility and Risk

`runtimeSettings` remains optional on every lifecycle hook param. Engines that ignore it continue unchanged. Engines with strict unknown-field validation now get the same compatibility retry behavior OpenClaw already uses for legacy `sessionKey` and `prompt` additions.

Remaining review risk: maintainers may still prefer live-Gateway proof in addition to standalone current-head proof. This branch now has current-head source-level configured-engine proof, focused validation, type validation, and full local build validation.

```json
      "mode": "fallback",
      "provider": "openai",
      "requested": "openai/gpt-5.5",
      "resolved": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
      "family": null,
      "fallbackActive": true,
      "fallbackReason": "primary_provider_5xx",
      "hostId": "openclaw-embedded",
      "tokenBudget": 2048
    }
  ],
  "result": "PASS"
}
```

- **Observed result after fix**: The configured context engine was selected by the registry from `plugins.slots.contextEngine`. Every required lifecycle path produced `runtimeSettings.schemaVersion: 1`, fallback mode, requested/resolved model split, provider, `family: null`, `fallbackActive: true`, fallback reason, and embedded host identity. Prompt-budgeted hooks saw `tokenBudget: 2048`; bootstrap/startup maintenance correctly had no prompt budget yet.
- **What was not tested**: The standalone proof does not itself restart the production Gateway. Local install and runtime smoke validation are tracked separately from this PR-body proof.

## Feedback Addressed

- Codex P1 strict-schema legacy-engine feedback: fixed by including `runtimeSettings` in legacy lifecycle compatibility stripping for bootstrap, maintain, afterTurn, assemble, and compact.
- Codex CI failure feedback: fixed the stale CLI bootstrap test to assert the new runtimeSettings contract instead of the pre-contract exact object shape.
- Copilot fallback consistency feedback: fixed fallbackActive/fallbackReason consistency and covered it with runtime-settings tests.
- Copilot model-family feedback: fixed model.family to remain `null` unless a real family is supplied.
- Copilot Error subclass feedback: named the runtime-settings Error subclasses.
- Copilot degraded/capability branch feedback: covered degraded mode, invalid host capabilities, and fallback consistency test branches.
- Scope feedback: reverted the Copilot Gemini provider-metadata change from the effective diff so this PR stays focused on context-engine runtime settings.

## Validation

Current-head validation at `39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5`:

```text
node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/context-engine/runtime-settings.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts src/agents/harness/context-engine-lifecycle.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/models.test.ts
PASS: 4 Vitest shards, 139 tests at previous beta.4 rebase head before provider-scope cleanup

node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/cli-runner.context-engine.test.ts
PASS: 1 Vitest shard, 12 tests

git diff --check origin/release/2026.5.31..HEAD
PASS

git diff --name-only origin/release/2026.5.31..HEAD | xargs pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1
PASS: all 20 matched files formatted

pnpm build
PASS: total 198.7s, check-plugin-sdk-exports OK

standalone runtimeSettings proof
PASS at 39696f319f1d812b3b08e9fe9698177f32c644a5
```

Full-repo `pnpm format:check` currently fails on pre-existing upstream files outside this PR surface, so changed-file formatting plus `git diff --check` are the relevant formatting gates for this branch.

## Compatibility and Risk

`runtimeSettings` remains optional on every lifecycle hook param. Engines that ignore it continue unchanged. Engines with strict unknown-field validation now get the same compatibility retry behavior OpenClaw already uses for legacy `sessionKey` and `prompt` additions.

Remaining review risk: maintainers may still prefer live-Gateway proof in addition to standalone current-head proof. This branch now has current-head source-level configured-engine proof, focused validation, type validation, and full local build validation.
